title: JBCクラシックの後に・浮かれ気分で？

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for your support today,
everyone!
Woooooo!

The winning concert has a much bigger crowd
than usual. The venue has never been this lively.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm sizzling.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: My whole body is still toasty.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: They sure were!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'd like to think I contributed... at least a little.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But the next race is gonna be even better! ♪
choice_data_list: I want to see you on the greatest stage there is.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Meaaaning...
choice_data_list: How about tackling the Tokyo Daishoten?
How about tackling the Tokyo Daishoten?

text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten is the final G1 race of the
year, taking place right after the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh! What a way to wrap up the year!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I feel like I've seen it a bunch on TV before.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Wait! That means it's a broadcast race! Are you
telling me this Umadol is gonna be on TV?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We can't let this opportunity go to waste! Let's
enter the Tokyo Daishoten!
We set our sights on the Tokyo Daishoten!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time... I'm heading for the top stage in
all of dirt racing! ☆
On our way back from the racetrack...

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, erm... You're that Umadol, Falco, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Mhm! ☆ The one and only! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, awesome! I actually found out about you
just recently...

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
See, one of my fellow idol fans told me all about
you. They said that there's an "Umadol" who goes
super hard!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
I've watched all of your videos on UmaTube! They
were so good!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy you liked them! ☆ Thanks a lot! ♪

Smart Falcon's performances appeal to more than
just racing fans, it seems. Her fanbase is steadily
growing...

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
When is your next performance? I haven't seen
you live yet, and I'd love to come watch!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be competing in the Tokyo
Daishoten next! Don't miss it!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: The Tokyo... Daishoten?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the Tokyo Daishoten! It's the last race of
the year!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh. I thought the last race was the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: I got it! I'll look it up and come watch! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, please do! ☆ Thank youuu! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Umm... This might be a strange thing to ask, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Dirt races are in right now, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No particular reason! I was just, you know,
curious...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Actually, just forget it! It's nothing, really!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! I have a favor to ask!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Can we go watch the Arima Kinen? We can, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's a household name—the top stage of the turf! I
could learn a lot by going there myself.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna study it for my Tokyo Daishoten
performance. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Come on! Pretty please?

Her overly cheerful demeanor makes me a little
uneasy, but I can't argue that we could learn
something from such a big race.
choice_data_list: Okay, let's go check it out.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaay! ☆ It's a promise. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, Trainer! Nighty niiight! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I hope you have a lovely dream about me! ♪

And so, we decide to watch the Arima Kinen
before we take on the Tokyo Daishoten.
